module.name: compare
module.description: Two labelled panels side by side (e.g. Plan A vs Plan B) with a circular "VS" badge between them.
module.aiSpec:
Use to contrast two options side by side with a "VS" badge between them (e.g. Plan A vs Plan B, old vs new, before vs after). Block module: the body has exactly two sections split by `<!-- @ -->` — the first is the left panel, the second the right panel (each ordinary Markdown). Panel titles/colors come from parameters. For a multi-row feature checklist use @comparetable; for more than two even panels use @columns.
Parameters: • left_title (text, default "Conventional Method") — heading of the left panel. • right_title (text, default "Proposed Method") — heading of the right panel. • color_left (color, default #95a5a6) — accent (border + header) of the left panel. • color_right (color, default var(--accent-color)) — accent of the right panel. • vs (text, default "VS") — text inside the center badge. • badge_color (color, default #333) — background color of the center badge. • layout (select: side | stacked, default side) — panels side by side or stacked vertically. • radius (CSS length, default 8px) — corner radius of the panels.
Example: <!-- @compare left_title: Plan A, right_title: Plan B, vs: OR, badge_color: #2563eb --> Low cost but takes time. <!-- @ --> High initial cost but highly efficient in the long run. <!-- @end -->

param.name: color_left
param.label: Left Color
param.desc: Accent (border and header) of the left panel

param.name: color_right
param.label: Right Color
param.desc: Accent (border and header) of the right panel

param.name: badge_color
param.label: Badge color
param.desc: Background color of the center badge

param.name: layout
param.label: Layout
param.desc: Panels side by side or stacked vertically

param.name: radius
param.label: Corner radius
param.desc: CSS length for the panel corner radius (e.g. 8px)

snippet.label: Compare Board
snippet.text: <!-- @compare left_title: Plan A, right_title: Plan B --> Low cost but takes time. <!-- @ --> High initial cost but highly efficient in the long run. <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Compares two elements with a VS badge in the center.
